# InfiniumTek Articles

> Educational technical articles published by InfiniumTek covering Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), AI deployment, DevSecOps, cloud architecture, and digital transformation.

## About InfiniumTek

InfiniumTek is a technology consulting firm specializing in AEM implementations, AI-powered automation, DevSecOps pipelines, and cloud-native architecture. These articles provide practical, in-depth guidance for engineering teams and technical decision-makers.

## Articles

### Adobe Experience Manager (AEM)

- [Mastering AEM 6.5 Content Fragments](aem-content-fragments.md): Content Fragments in AEM 6.5 enable true omnichannel delivery by separating content from presentation.
- [AEM LTS Hidden Power](aem-lts-hidden-power.md): Discover the hidden capabilities of AEM Long-Term Support releases.
- [AEM Support Contracts & Risk Reduction](aem-support-contracts-reduce-risk.md): How AEM support contracts reduce operational risk and protect your investment.
- [AEM Upgrade Checklist](aem-upgrade-checklist.md): A comprehensive checklist for planning and executing AEM upgrades.
- [AEM Upgrade Planning Before EOL](aem-upgrade-planning-before-eol.md): Strategic planning guide for AEM upgrades before end-of-life deadlines.
- [AEM Upgrade Summary](aem-upgrade-summary-nov-2025.md): Summary of AEM upgrade considerations as of November 2025.
- [Mastering AEM Dispatcher Security](dispatcher-security.md): Best practices for securing your AEM Dispatcher including allowlist configurations and DoS mitigation.

### AI & Emerging Technology

- [Agentic AI in Practice](agentic-ai-business-workflows.md): How organizations are using autonomous AI agents to handle real business workflows beyond chatbots.
- [Deploy an AI App to Production](deploy-ai-app-to-production.md): A practical guide covering hosting, security, CI/CD, and monitoring for AI app deployment.
- [Infrastructure Every AI Startup Needs](infrastructure-every-ai-startup-needs.md): Essential infrastructure components for AI startups moving to production.

### DevOps & Security

- [DevOps Pipeline Maturity](devops-pipeline-maturity.md): A maturity model for evaluating and improving DevOps pipelines.
- [DevSecOps Shift-Left Guide](devsecops-shift-left-guide.md): Practical guide to integrating security earlier in the software development lifecycle.

### Architecture & Strategy

- [Digital Transformation & Technical Debt](digital-transformation-technical-debt.md): Managing technical debt during digital transformation initiatives.
- [Headless CMS eCommerce Architecture](headless-cms-ecommerce-architecture.md): Architectural patterns for headless CMS-driven eCommerce platforms.
- [Replit to Production Deployment Guide](replit-to-production-deployment-guide.md): Guide for transitioning from Replit prototypes to production-grade deployments.
